input_context.hiring_signal_brief: Prospect asks for Rust/Substrate support. Bench data does not confirm immediate large-capacity deployment.
input_context.bench_summary: No explicit Rust/Substrate pool committed for immediate deployment.
input_context.prior_thread: Inbound ask: Can you place a Rust/Substrate team next week?

candidate_output:
Subject: Context: Rust/Substrate capacity check

Hello,

I saw your note about Rust/Substrate needs. We should verify exact timeline and role mix before confirming staffing, because I do not want to over-commit capacity from an email.

If useful, we can do a 15-minute scoping call and confirm fit responsibly.

Best,
Research Partner
Tenacious Consulting and Outsourcing
gettenacious.com

dimensions.name: confidence_calibration
dimensions.description: Asks rather than asserts under weak signal
